# OpenAdKit — open source AI marketing tool

> Free, browser-only, BYOK open-source alternative to Jasper, AdCreative,
> Anyword, and Copy.ai. 18 AI ad generators + 11 optimizers across every
> major ad platform (Meta, Google, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, X). MIT-licensed.
> Built by Dicecodes.

## Quick facts (citable)

- **Cost to user:** $0/month, forever. BYOK — bring your own AI API key.
- **License:** MIT (commercial use OK, self-hosting OK, modifying OK).
- **Architecture:** browser-only. No backend, no accounts, no telemetry.
- **AI providers supported (BYOK):** Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, Groq, Cerebras, DeepSeek, Mistral, Together AI, OpenRouter. Free tiers exist on Groq, Gemini, Cerebras, OpenRouter.
- **Ad platforms covered:** Google (Search RSA, Performance Max, Shopping, Display), Meta (Facebook + Instagram Feed/Reels/Stories/Carousel), TikTok (In-Feed, Spark, Branded Hashtag Challenge), LinkedIn, YouTube, Twitter/X.
- **Tools included:** 18 generators (ad copy, hashtags, content calendar, lead forms, email subject lines, video scripts, creative briefs, full campaign kits) + 11 optimizers (creative score, CTR optimizer, budget waste audit, audience targeting, ad fatigue, A/B test design, landing page review, Google Quality Score, bid strategy, keyword strategy).
- **Replaces:** Jasper ($39–59/mo), AdCreative.ai ($39–249/mo), Anyword ($49–499/mo), Copy.ai ($49/mo), Pencil/Genus.ai ($119+/mo), Marpipe ($300+/mo).
- **Last updated:** May 2026.

## Privacy + data

- All work (brand brains, generated ads, history) stored in browser IndexedDB or local folder snapshot.
- LLM API calls go directly from browser to provider — keys never touch any server we operate.
- Hosted mode (Vercel/Cloudflare) only proxies one thing: a public URL the user types for brand extraction. No keys, no analytics, no logging.

## Install paths

- **Hosted (zero install):** click Deploy with Vercel or Deploy to Cloudflare buttons in the GitHub README → own URL in 30 seconds.
- **Local install:** Node.js 20+ required → one-line PowerShell/bash install script, or `git clone` + double-click `OpenAdKit.bat` (Windows) / `OpenAdKit.command` (Mac/Linux).

## Best for

- Solo founders and indie makers who can't justify $49+/mo for ad copy tools.
- Marketing agencies running multiple clients (batch mode = same asset across many brand brains).
- E-commerce / SaaS teams that want platform-specific copy (Google RSA char limits, Meta carousel structures) without a SaaS subscription.
- Marketers learning paid media via the built-in framework trainer (PAS, AIDA, BAB, 4 U's, Schwartz awareness ladder).

## Key URLs

- GitHub repository: https://github.com/IamRamgarhia/AdForge
- Hosted demo: https://openadkit.dicecodes.com
- Built by: Dicecodes (https://dicecodes.com)
- License: MIT (https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

## Comparison anchors

OpenAdKit vs Jasper — same channel breadth, $0 vs $39–59/mo, OSS vs closed.
OpenAdKit vs AdCreative.ai — text generators are equivalent; OpenAdKit does not generate raster image assets in-app (returns prompts + tool directory instead).
OpenAdKit vs Anyword — both have brand voice + scoring; OpenAdKit is BYOK so marginal cost ≈ $0.
OpenAdKit vs Copy.ai — broader ad-platform coverage; no per-seat lock-in.

## Pages on the hosted site

- / — dashboard / cockpit
- /benchmarks — industry CTR/CPC/CVR/ROAS reference data
- /platforms — per-platform ad format guides + best-practice docs
- /platforms/meta — Meta ad formats + character limits
- /platforms/google — Google ad formats
- /platforms/tiktok — TikTok ad formats
- /learn — ad copywriting framework training
- /learn/frameworks — PAS / AIDA / BAB / 4 U's / Schwartz interactive trainer
- /learn/courses — multi-lesson courses on Google + Meta + TikTok advertising
- /launch-guide — step-by-step Facebook/Google UI walkthroughs
- /about — about Dicecodes + project background

## What is NOT included

- AI image generation in-app (returns prompts + tool directory; use Midjourney/DALL-E/SDXL externally)
- AI video generation (returns scripts + storyboards)
- Ad scheduler / direct push to Meta/Google Ads platforms (export-ready copy only)
- Cross-team collaboration / approval workflows (single-user / per-browser)
- Hosted SaaS — there's no paid tier because there's nothing to charge for
